Configuration for building documentation with Read the Docs using Sphinx on Ubuntu 22.04 with Python 3.12.

# Purpose
The configuration file specifies the environment and tools for building a project. It sets the `os` to `ubuntu-22.04` and uses Python version `3.12`. The file instructs to install Python dependencies listed in `requirements/docs.txt` using the `pip` method from the current directory. It configures Sphinx to use the `dirhtml` builder and to fail the build process if there are any warnings.
